name: Release v26.4
body:
- Full chart stack: creation, editing, 70+ chart types, structural elements, and visual formatting — including 3D charts.
- Shape-level and text-level animations with a rich set of effect types and triggers.
- Slide transitions: all standard and extended transition types (fade, push, wipe, morph, etc.).
- Presentation theme management: color, font, and format schemes with override support.
- Slide and master backgrounds.
- Nested shape grouping via `GroupShape`.

# Release Notes

## v26.3.1 — March 2026

First public release of **aspose-slides-foss**, the official open-source Python library by Aspose.Slides.

### Implemented

**Presentation**
- Open existing `.pptx` files and create new ones
- Full round-trip fidelity — unknown XML parts are preserved verbatim on save
- Save to `.pptx` format via `SaveFormat.PPTX`
- Context manager support (`with Presentation(...) as prs`)

**Slides**
- Add, insert, remove, clone, and reorder slides
- Access layout and master slides

**Shapes**
- AutoShapes — add, insert, remove, reorder, iterate
- PictureFrames — embed images from file, bytes, or stream
- Tables — rows, columns, cells, merge, borders, fill, style options
- Connectors — straight, bent, and elbow connectors with shape-to-shape connections and auto-reroute
- `ShapeType` enum with full preset catalog

**Text**
- `TextFrame`, `Paragraph`, `Portion` model
- Character formatting: bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, font size, font name, color
- Paragraph formatting: alignment, indent, spacing, bullet styles
- Text frame formatting: anchor, autofit, wrap, margins

**Fill**
- Solid, gradient, pattern, picture, and no-fill modes
- Gradient stops, direction, and shape
- Tile flip for picture fills

**Line**
- Width, dash style, cap style, join style
- Arrowhead style, length, and width
- Line fill (solid color)

**Effects**
- Outer shadow, inner shadow, glow, soft edge, blur, reflection
- Enable/disable individual effects per shape

**3D Formatting**
- Bevel top and bottom (preset type, width, height)
- Camera preset and rotation
- Light rig preset and direction
- Material preset and extrusion depth

**Document Properties**
- Core properties: title, author, subject, keywords, description, category, created/modified dates
- Custom properties

**Images**
- `ImageCollection` — add images from file path, byte array, or stream
- `PPImage` — access image data and dimensions

**Notes Slides**
- Add, access, and remove per-slide notes
- Notes text frame with full text formatting

**Comments**
- `CommentAuthorCollection` — add and remove authors
- `CommentCollection` — add, insert, remove, and clear comments per author
- Comment position, creation time, and text

**Masters and Layouts**
- Access master slides and layout slides

### Requirements

- Python 3.10 or later
- `lxml` 4.9 or later (installed automatically)
